title: Chat LLM Translation
description: This mod uses AI to translate chat messages sent and received on multiplayer servers using generic LLM.
body:
**Chat LLM Translation**

Real-time chat translation mod for Minecraft - Fully offline operation using local LLM

Features
- Automatic translation of received messages (English to Japanese)
- Automatic translation of sent messages (Japanese to English)
- Uses local LLM (fully offline operation)
- RAG-based translation cache (instant translation of duplicated sentences)
- Per-server cache management (saves translation history for each server separately)
- Full cache load option (loads all previous translations when joining a server)
- llama-server auto-start (automatically starts the LLM server when the mod is launched and stops it when - the mod is closed)
- Multi-GPU support (allows separate GPUs for Minecraft and LLM)
- Auto-download function (automatically retrieves necessary files on first launch)
- Prompt caching (speeds up)
- Context-aware translation (natural translation taking into account past conversations)
